name: pass
title: Pass
description: Mission control for Claude Code sessions running in tmux. List, reply to, and create pass sessions straight from Raycast.
author: zimin_byun

preferences.name: terminalApp
preferences.title: Attach Terminal
preferences.description: Which terminal to open when attaching to a tmux session.

preferences.name: claudeCommand
preferences.title: Claude Launch Command
preferences.description: Command typed into a fresh session when the agent is Claude.

preferences.name: codexCommand
preferences.title: Codex Launch Command
preferences.description: Command typed into a fresh session when the agent is Codex.

preferences.name: piCommand
preferences.title: pi Launch Command
preferences.description: Command typed into a fresh session when the agent is pi.

commands.name: list-sessions
commands.title: List Sessions
commands.subtitle: Pass
commands.description: Browse every pass session with its last response and attention state. Reply, answer prompts, attach, or kill.

commands.name: reply
commands.title: Reply to Session
commands.subtitle: Pass
commands.description: Pick a running pass session and inject a reply into its agent.

commands.name: send-message
commands.title: Send Message to Session
commands.subtitle: Pass
commands.description: Send text and/or a file's contents to a pass session's agent.

commands.name: new-session
commands.title: New Session
commands.subtitle: Pass
commands.description: Create a new pass tmux session for a project and launch an agent.

commands.name: attention
commands.title: Pass Attention
commands.subtitle: Pass
commands.description: Menu-bar count of pass sessions that need your answer right now.
